diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,148 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports default app, exports types and Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: main entry point re-exports everything
+- Copy-safe detail: default export uses ./hono; re-exports Context class and types
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: type definitions for Hono modules
+- Internal names noticed: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, HandlerResponse, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, ToSchema, Schema, AddSchemaIfHasSchema, Endpoint, ExtractParams, MergeSchemaPath, AddParam, AddDollar, MergePath, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, TypedResponse, MergeTypedResponse, ExtractTypedResponseOnly, MergeMiddlewareResponse, FormValue, ParsedFormValue, ValidationTargets, ParamKey, ParamKeys, ParamKeyToRecord, InputToDataByTarget, RemoveQuestion, ExtractSchema, ExtractSchemaForStatusCode, ExtractHandlerResponse, ProcessHead, IntersectNonAnyTypes, FetchEventLike
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: comprehensive type definitions
+- Copy-safe detail: exports multiple type aliases and interfaces including core Env/Handler types
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class exported as default
+- Internal names noticed: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: main application class extending HonoBase
+- Copy-safe detail: class Hono extends HonoBase with router injection
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class
+- Internal names noticed: NotAllowedHeader, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, GetPath, HonoOptions, MountOptionHandler, MountReplaceRequest, MountOptions, Hono, Router, RouterRoute, basePath, route, onError, use, fetch, clone, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./context, ./router, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./http-exception
+- Plain-English summary: base framework with router pattern matching
+- Copy-safe detail: class Hono provides routing middleware composition and fetch handling; exports as HonoBase
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class
+- Internal names noticed: Data, ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, ResponseOrInit, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance, context, ResponseHeadersInit, ResolvedMime
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: request context with response handling
+- Copy-safe detail: class Context manages request/response lifecycle with variables and cookies
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Body, BodyCache, OptionalRequestInitProperties, RequiredRequestInit, cloneRawRequest, param, params, query, queries, header, headers, raw, url, method, valid, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, get, set
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./utils/url, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: request parsing and validation utility
+- Copy-safe detail: class HonoRequest parses URL params, queries, headers, and request body; exports cloneRawRequest helper
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: constant symbol for HTTP matching result
+- Copy-safe detail: exports unique symbol for match result detection
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, ParseBody, ParseBodyOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: parses request body data from form data
+- Copy-safe detail: parseBody async function parses FormData with dot/flatten options
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: middleware function composition utility
+- Copy-safe detail: compose takes array of functions returns single composed function
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: exception class for HTTP errors with response
+- Copy-safe detail: class HTTPException extends Error with status and body properties
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports hc, parseResponse, DetailedError type
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: client API exports
+- Copy-safe detail: re-exports hc and utils helpers
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: hc, ClientRequestImpl, Callback, createProxy, deepMerge, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, isObject, mergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./types, ../utils/cookie, ./utils, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: request builder generating dynamic client calls
+- Copy-safe detail: hc generates request implementations based on app routes and options
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client type, Fetch type, ClientRequest type
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, Client, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickSchema, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickRoute, PickByResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, ClientResponse, ClientResponse
